steps.title: Use the optional action
steps.content: The passage says discoverers may name minor planets, but they are not required to do so. The blank therefore needs a word meaning allowed but optional.

steps.title: Reject opposite meanings
steps.content: Choice B means not feasible, but the example shows naming can happen. Choice C means selective, which does not express permission. Choice D means required, directly contradicting the passage. The remaining word means permitted. The answer is A.
